title: Enhanced Block Entities NEOFORGED
description: This mod is an unofficial fork of the Enhanced Block Entities mod for the previously unsupported modloader, NeoForge.
body:
**This mod is an unofficial fork of the Enhanced Block Entities mod for the previously unsupported modloader, Neoforge.** Link to the original **[mod](https://github.com/FoundationGames/EnhancedBlockEntities)**. Link to the original **[author](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames)**. **The mod allows for the configuration and optimization of block entity rendering using a more modern approach.** The mod is compatible with the Sodium mod, which can be found at https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions?l=neoforge

## FPS Boost Rendering 1700 chests: ### Vanilla ![Before](https://github.com/FoundationGames/EnhancedBlockEntities/raw/116_indev/img/before.png) ### With EBE ![After](https://github.com/FoundationGames/EnhancedBlockEntities/raw/116_indev/img/after.png)
A 155% frame rate increase!
